text:
**As of April 2026, consumer BCIs are at an early but accelerating commercial stage.**

### Key Development: Sabi BCI Beanie
- First consumer BCI wearable shipping end of 2026
- 70,000–100,000 miniature EEG sensors woven into fabric (beanie/cap)
- Thought-to-text at ~30 words per minute, improving with use
- Trained on ~100,000 hours of brain data from 100 volunteers
- Funders: Vinod Khosla, Accel, Initialized, Kevin Weil
- Strategy: non-invasive, clothing-like, no surgery

### Neuralink (Medical/Invasive)
- Scaling from dozens to thousands of implants annually
- Moving toward fully automated robotic surgery
- Consumer/elective versions NOT expected in 2026
- Possible expanded applications (focus, mood, depression) by 2027–2028

### Key Insight
2026 = the year consumer BCI becomes real. Non-invasive solutions like Sabi lead true consumer adoption. Neuralink perfects high-bandwidth foundation for medical users first.
